description_long: This is a modern, open-frame shelving unit featuring a geometric black metal structure and five wooden shelves. The shelves are arranged in an asymmetrical, staggered pattern, with some triangular and some rectangular surfaces, creating a visually dynamic and functional storage solution. The frame is constructed from thin, square metal tubing, providing both stability and a minimalist aesthetic. The wooden shelves have a light, natural finish that contrasts with the dark metal frame, enhancing the contemporary look. The open design allows for visibility and access from multiple angles, making it suitable for displaying decorative items or storing books and urban essentials. Its unique shape and sturdy construction make it ideal for use in urban environments such as lofts, offices, or public spaces.
description: A modern, open-frame shelving unit with a black metal structure and staggered light wood shelves. Its geometric, asymmetrical design offers both storage and display functionality.
description_view_0: This view highlights the staggered arrangement of the shelves and the open, angular frame on the left side.
description_view_1: This angle shows the depth of the shelves and the unique triangular shelf shapes on the right side.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the vertical alignment of the shelves and the open space in the center of the frame.
description_view_3: This view reveals the alternating shelf pattern and the open, airy structure of the shelving unit.
